languages.text: "Одну минуту". {n}Ювенна всматривается в ваше лицо.{/n} "Да, думаю, вы подойдете. Мне нужен достойный компаньон для прогулки за ворота — хочу выяснить, в каком состоянии фамильный алтарь. Он в алькове на севере, здесь недалеко".

"One moment." {n}Juvenna stares intently at your face.{/n} "Yes, I think you'll do. I require a worthy companion for an outing beyond the gates — I wish to ascertain the condition of my family's altar. It is located in an alcove to the north, not far from here."
languages.original_text: "Одну минуту". {n}Ювенна всматривается в ваше лицо.{/n} "Да, думаю, вы подойдете. Мне нужен достойный компаньон для прогулки за ворота — хочу выяснить, в каком состоянии фамильный алтарь. Он в алькове на севере, здесь недалеко".

traits.locale_text: "One moment." {n}Juvenna stares intently at your face.{/n} "Yes, I think you'll do. I require a worthy companion for an outing beyond the gates — I wish to ascertain the condition of my family's altar. It is located in an alcove to the north, not far from here."

"One moment." {n}Juvenna stares intently at your face.{/n} "Yes, I think you'll do. I require a worthy companion for an outing beyond the gates — I wish to ascertain the condition of my family's altar. It is located in an alcove to the north, not far from here."

"One moment." {n}Juvenna stares intently at your face.{/n} "Yes, I think you'll do. I require a worthy companion for an outing beyond the gates — I wish to ascertain the condition of my family's altar. It is located in an alcove to the north, not far from here."

languages.text: «Un momento». {n}Juvenna observa tu rostro con intensidad.{/n} «Sí, creo que servirá. Necesito un{mf||a} acompañante dign{mf|o|a} para cruzar las puertas; deseo comprobar el estado del altar familiar. Se encuentra en una hornacina al norte, no muy lejos de aquí».
languages.original_text: "One moment." {n}Juvenna stares intently at your face.{/n} "Yes, I think you'll do. I require a worthy companion for an outing beyond the gates — I wish to ascertain the condition of my family's altar. It is located in an alcove to the north, not far from here."

traits.locale_text: «Un momento». {n}Juvenna observa tu rostro con intensidad.{/n} «Sí, creo que servirá. Necesito un{mf||a} acompañante dign{mf|o|a} para cruzar las puertas; deseo comprobar el estado del altar familiar. Se encuentra en una hornacina al norte, no muy lejos de aquí».

languages.text: “稍等一下。”{n}尤文娜凝视着你的脸。{/n}“嗯，我看你行。我需要一个配得上我的人，陪我出去一趟。我想去看看家族祭坛的情况。就在北边的一个壁龛里，离这儿不远。”
languages.original_text: "One moment." {n}Juvenna stares intently at your face.{/n} "Yes, I think you'll do. I require a worthy companion for an outing beyond the gates — I wish to ascertain the condition of my family's altar. It is located in an alcove to the north, not far from here."

traits.locale_text: “稍等一下。”{n}尤文娜凝视着你的脸。{/n}“嗯，我看你行。我需要一个配得上我的人，陪我出去一趟。我想去看看家族祭坛的情况。就在北边的一个壁龛里，离这儿不远。”

languages.text: « Un petit instant, {n}lâche Juvenna en vous détaillant du regard.{/n} Oui, vous devriez faire l'affaire. J'ai besoin d'une bonne escorte pour une petite excursion en dehors de l'enceinte. Je tiens à m'assurer de l'état actuel de l'autel familial. Il se trouve dans une alcôve au nord, non loin d'ici. »
languages.original_text: "One moment." {n}Juvenna stares intently at your face.{/n} "Yes, I think you'll do. I require a worthy companion for an outing beyond the gate — I wish to ascertain the condition of my family's altar. It is located in an alcove to the north, not far from here."

traits.locale_text: « Un petit instant, {n}lâche Juvenna en vous détaillant du regard.{/n} Oui, vous devriez faire l'affaire. J'ai besoin d'une bonne escorte pour une petite excursion en dehors de l'enceinte. Je tiens à m'assurer de l'état actuel de l'autel familial. Il se trouve dans une alcôve au nord, non loin d'ici. »

languages.text: "Bir saniye." {n}Juvenna dikkatle yüzüne bakıyor.{/n} "Evet, sanırım olabilir. Kapının ötesindeki bir gezinti için değerli bir yoldaşa ihtiyacım var. Ailemin sunağının durumunu öğrenmek istiyorum. Buralara çok uzak olmayan, kuzeydeki bir hücrede bulunuyor."
languages.original_text: "One moment." {n}Juvenna stares intently at your face.{/n} "Yes, I think you'll do. I require a worthy companion for an outing beyond the gates — I wish to ascertain the condition of my family's altar. It is located in an alcove to the north, not far from here."

traits.locale_text: "Bir saniye." {n}Juvenna dikkatle yüzüne bakıyor.{/n} "Evet, sanırım olabilir. Kapının ötesindeki bir gezinti için değerli bir yoldaşa ihtiyacım var. Ailemin sunağının durumunu öğrenmek istiyorum. Buralara çok uzak olmayan, kuzeydeki bir hücrede bulunuyor."

languages.text: "Einen Moment." {n}Juvenna mustert dein Gesicht.{/n} "Ja, ich denke, mit Euch geht es. Ich brauche eine würdige Begleitung für einen Ausflug jenseits des Tores ... ich möchte mich vom Zustand des Altars meiner Familie überzeugen. Er befindet sich nicht weit von hier in einem Alkoven im Norden."
languages.original_text: "One moment." {n}Juvenna stares intently at your face.{/n} "Yes, I think you'll do. I require a worthy companion for an outing beyond the gates — I wish to ascertain the condition of my family's altar. It is located in an alcove to the north, not far from here."

traits.locale_text: "Einen Moment." {n}Juvenna mustert dein Gesicht.{/n} "Ja, ich denke, mit Euch geht es. Ich brauche eine würdige Begleitung für einen Ausflug jenseits des Tores ... ich möchte mich vom Zustand des Altars meiner Familie überzeugen. Er befindet sich nicht weit von hier in einem Alkoven im Norden."

languages.text: 「少々お待ちください。」{n}ジュベナはあなたの顔を見つめながら言った。{/n}「ええ、あなたならきっと大丈夫でしょう。城の外へ出かけるに相応しい仲間が必要なのです。私の家の祭壇の状況を確認したいのです。ここはここからは少し離れた北側の壁龕にあります。」
languages.original_text: "One moment." {n}Juvenna stares intently at your face.{/n} "Yes, I think you'll do. I require a worthy companion for an outing beyond the gates — I wish to ascertain the condition of my family's altar. It is located in an alcove to the north, not far from here."

traits.locale_text: 「少々お待ちください。」{n}ジュベナはあなたの顔を見つめながら言った。{/n}「ええ、あなたならきっと大丈夫でしょう。城の外へ出かけるに相応しい仲間が必要なのです。私の家の祭壇の状況を確認したいのです。ここはここからは少し離れた北側の壁龕にあります。」
